settings._comment: WP19.1 TASK-3-005: default CLI preset Lighthouse 13.x = mobile Moto G Power + Slow 4G (1.6Mbps DL / 750Kbps UL / 150ms RTT). Non passare 'mobile' come valore (non esiste in 13.x); omettere preset = mobile default. Desktop mantenuto come override per profili non-gate. WP30 TASK-WP30-F5-07: aggiunta /en/tier-list (deterministico, no Riot upstream call). /en/summoner/<seed> non aggiunto al collect statico perche' richiede seed real (NO mock); misurato manualmente (vedi `mobile_target_wp30_summoner` block) quando founder fornisce seed via env. WP31 TASK-WP31-F5-07: /en/match-history e /en/match/<id> NON aggiunti al collect statico perche' Premium-gated (richiedono JWT effective_tier active|trialing — NO mock policy). Misurati manualmente con env LIGHTHOUSE_WP31_MATCH_HISTORY_URL + LIGHTHOUSE_WP31_MATCH_DETAIL_URL (vedi blocchi mobile_target_wp31_*).

mobile_target._comment: WP19.1 gate REQ-NF-019-1-005. Invocazione manuale via npx lighthouse (NON lhci autorun), vedi dev-repository/design/wp19_1/api-contracts.md §4. Soglia LCP <2000ms, delta ≥500ms vs baseline 4290ms.

mobile_target_wp30_tier_list._comment: WP30 REQ-NF-030-001: LCP < 2.5s p75 mobile per /en/tier-list. Manual run con `npx lighthouse https://www.lolsensei.com/en/tier-list --only-categories=performance,accessibility --form-factor=mobile`. Soglia: LCP <= 2500ms, a11y >= 0.90.

mobile_target_wp30_summoner._comment: WP30 REQ-NF-030-001: LCP < 2.5s p75 mobile per /en/summoner/<seed>. URL e' un placeholder; la run reale richiede seed via env LIGHTHOUSE_WP30_SUMMONER_URL (NO mock policy). Soglia: LCP <= 2500ms, a11y >= 0.90.

mobile_target_wp31_match_history._comment: WP31 REQ-NF-031-001: LCP < 2.5s p75 mobile per /en/match-history. URL e' un placeholder; la run reale richiede premium JWT cookie + URL completi via env LIGHTHOUSE_WP31_MATCH_HISTORY_URL + LIGHTHOUSE_WP31_PREMIUM_COOKIE (NO mock policy — match data reali da utente test Premium). Soglia: LCP <= 2500ms, a11y >= 0.90. Esecuzione manuale ops post-deploy: `npx lighthouse $LIGHTHOUSE_WP31_MATCH_HISTORY_URL --extra-headers='{"Cookie":"<premium_jwt>"}' --only-categories=performance,accessibility --form-factor=mobile`.

mobile_target_wp31_match_detail._comment: WP31 REQ-NF-031-001: LCP < 2.5s p75 mobile per /en/match/<id>. URL completo richiesto via env LIGHTHOUSE_WP31_MATCH_DETAIL_URL (NO mock policy — match_id reale di utente test Premium). Soglia: LCP <= 2500ms, a11y >= 0.90. Esecuzione manuale ops post-deploy come sopra.

assertMatrix._comment: WP30 REQ-NF-030-001: LCP gate desktop < 2.5s + a11y >= 90.

WP31 REQ-NF-031-001 + REQ-NF-031-007: LCP gate desktop < 2.5s + a11y >= 90 + noindex enforcement (non gate-able da Lighthouse — verificato in E2E Playwright wp31-paywall-noindex.spec.ts). Premium-gated route: nei run CI con preset desktop la pagina ritorna redirect 302 a /en/pricing — assertMatrix matcha solo run autenticati con cookie.
WP31 REQ-NF-031-001: same as match-history. Premium-gated. Verifica manuale via mobile_target_wp31_match_detail.
